text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night during the holidays, a scream
unbefitting of such a season roars through the
shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Staff
text_block_list.text: Stop, thief!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't just ignore something like that. I chase
after the fleeing figure and find...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shadowy figure I was chasing turns out to be
El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You... got me...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right. The mysterious figure flitting
throughout the town like Santa on this special
night is...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
None other than me, El Condor Pasa, the
Snowfall Smuggler!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wait, wait, wait! Don't get me wrong, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahem. I'm the Snowfall Smuggler, not thief.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: What I'm doin' is totally different!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, I'm smuggling holiday presents to
everyone!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm a celebrity, after all! In my country, it's only
natural for celebrities to donate gifts!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I heard that masked wrestlers in Japan give
school bags to children too.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been secretly smuggling presents
to the kids around here!
choice_data_list:
Don't you think it'd be better to just volunteer
like a normal person?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well... there's a reason I can't just do it out in the
open...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You see... The reason is...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The Snowfall Smuggler can't reveal her true
identity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Basically... she just really likes pretending to be
the "Snowfall Smuggler."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You gotta let me go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I've still got a ton of gifts to give out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I acquiesce to her request, but that doesn't mean
I think sneaking around is a great idea.
choice_data_list:
At least try to get permission from their parents
first.

At least try to get permission from their parents
first.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! That's a good idea. If I talk to their
parents, we can keep the dream alive!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I promise I'll do that, Trainer. And with that...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm off! Chao!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She flips her cloak and takes off. Hopefully, this
will be a better way for her to take on the role of
Santa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Not long after...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wee woo wee woo!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Stop! Thief!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm not a thief! You've got it all wrong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is being chased by a child playing
policeman. It seems like people still think she is a
plain old thief.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I've still got a ton of gifts to give out!
choice_data_list: I really don't think it's a good idea...
I really don't think it's a good idea...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Por qué no? Why not?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her she should give out the gifts in plain
sight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her true identity will still be safe since she's
wearing a mask anyway.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh, right! Duh! How did I not think of that?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll give some presents out at the park,
then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang, clang!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Is everyone here? Good! Swish! Fwoosh! Who's that lurking in the festive shadows?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's the Snowfall Smuggler, delivering the finest
presents to all the good boys and girls!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Hey! It's El Condor Pasa! El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, no, I'm not! I'm the Snowfall Smuggler,
not El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Here's your present!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Forget the present! I wanna shake your hand! And
a hug! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, wait, wait! This isn't what I was expecting!
Line up, please!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Aaaghhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is swarmed by children. They seem
much happier to see her than to be getting gifts.
